---
title: "About"
---

# About Me

My name is **Henry Yin**, and I am currently a Statistics and Data Science student at the **University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA)**.

I am interested in data analysis, statistical modeling, and applying quantitative methods to real-world problems. My goal is to develop strong analytical skills that can be used to support data-driven decision making in business and technology.

## Education

### University of California, Los Angeles
**Bachelor of Science — Statistics and Data Science**  
Expected Graduation: June 2026  
GPA: 3.58

Relevant areas of study include:

- Statistical inference
- Linear regression
- Data analysis
- Model diagnostics
- Data visualization

### Santa Monica College

**Associate of Science — Computer Science**  
2022 – 2024  
GPA: 3.92

## Technical Skills

### Programming

- Python
- R
- SQL
- C++

### Data Tools

- RStudio
- Power BI
- Microsoft Excel
- Git / GitHub

### Statistical Methods

- Linear regression
- Hypothesis testing
- Model transformation
- Diagnostic plots
- Statistical inference

### Data Visualization

- ggplot2
- matplotlib
- seaborn
- base R graphics

## Languages

- English (fluent)
- Mandarin (native)

## Career Interests

I am currently interested in roles related to:

- Data Analysis
- Data Science
- Business Analytics
- Statistical Modeling
